title: QIF spec alignment check for v0.1 docs
description: Check current implementation against docs/specs/v0.1 with QIF quality intent/risk/loss framing; fix low-risk drift and record residual gaps.
triage_notes: QIF spec alignment check DONE. Added docs/aof/QIF-SPEC-CHECK-2026-06-27.md. Fixed low-risk drift from docs/specs/v0.1: spec-shaped view.default base/overlays, core 3d fallback with view_3d_unavailable, real overview/zone overlay projection composition without reparsing, shared overlay logic for flat semantic views, typed permission resources, and node principal permission resolution. Verification: typecheck, test (80), build, organization-verify 22/22. Residual gaps documented: engine custom element/src lifecycle, RenderResult controls, full permission edge synthesis, inspector/conflict priority.
